label: sandbox_diagnostics • multi-line python3 -c parse error surfaces escape hint
notes: Reproduces the canonical local-model failure: a multi-line script embedded in `python3 -c "…"` whose JSON→shell→code escaping broke, so bash mis-parsed the body and exited with `syntax error near unexpected token '('`. The self-heal hint must fire and point at sandbox_write_file (write the script to a file, then run it with sandbox_exec).

sandboxDiagnostics.command:
curl -s https://example.com | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(data)"
sandboxDiagnostics.stderr: bash: -c: line 3: syntax error near unexpected token `('
